<!--
Thanks for sending a patch. Keep this short; delete sections that do not apply.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for what lands easily and what needs an issue first.
-->

## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences on the change and the problem it solves. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Banner brief / OG copy / version source
- [ ] Bug fix (renderer, prompt builder, SEO, sync)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Fleet-wide change (design tokens, SEO contract, anchors, OG dimensions) — opened an issue first per CONTRIBUTING.md

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Updated the `Unreleased` section of `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible effect
- [ ] No personal details, real hostnames, real IPs, account names, tokens, or unredacted absolute paths (the `content-guard` CI job will fail otherwise); banner/OG content uses placeholders and `192.0.2.x` example IPs only
- [ ] No generated banner added as a style anchor
- [ ] No new runtime dependency
- [ ] Conventional commit messages, no AI co-authorship trailers
